title: MTR : East Japan Railway Addon
description: This mod adds elements of East Japan's railways to MTR MOD.
body:
# 📖Features

**“MTR: East Japan Railway Addon” is a mod for “Minecraft Transit Railway” that adds numerous blocks inspired by JR East.**

**Please note that in order to install and run this mod properly, you must first install version 3.2.2 of “Minecraft Transit Railway” (as of February 2, 2026).**

The supported languages are as follows.

_Japanese / English_

## 🚃What's New

Platforms, ticket gates, and signals with standard MTR functionality will be added. In addition, a custom system incorporating elements such as departure boards and railroad crossings will be added.

## 🖼️Media

**The train cars and tracks shown in the image are not included.**

![Railroad crossing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c187d4f1e527ccf091cba10e63fa27aff2ee3ddd.png)
![Elevated](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/35a6b6394efe129c5bf436c5a377daf2aa09d87b.png)

## ❓F.A.Q.

Q. I would like to propose a new block.

A. We encourage you to join our Discord server. If your suggestion is accepted, it will be added.

Q. I found a typo.

A. Please report to the producer. We will fix it in the next update.
